title: Brass Fort Smith Prison Guard Belt Buckle
description:
The Fort Smith Arkansas Prison Guard belt buckle let's everybody know who's in charge. This die struck solid brass buckle features an antique finish for a vintage motif. Display it in your home or slide it on an ammo belt for when you go to the range. Fort Smith, Arkansas is an historic American military post making this piece perfect for collectors and history buffs alike.
